text: Gov. Bill Richardson confirmed for 1:15pm lunch at Epstein's NYC home — scheduling emails show exact address and confirmed time
Epstein in NYC March 21-23, 2018 hoping to arrange meeting with Ehud Barak — staff email to Nili Priell Barak seeking time
Epstein staff emails AI researcher Joscha Bach to meet at Harvard, March 25, 2018; Bach confirms.
Masha Drokova emails Epstein staff to schedule NYC meeting with Jeffrey, March 29–April 1, 2018.
